productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Black Formal Shoes
description: With a sleek finish and fine construction, these handcrafted derby shoes from franco leone add an elegant finishing touch to a formal outfit. Upper Leather upper for absolute comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Pointed toe design for absolute style Inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfort Leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with textured grooves for durability TPR raised heel for absolute ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
